name: Caldo Callego (Spanish Vegetable and Sausage Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 packets Instant Beef Broth and Seasoning Mix
1 packet Instant Chicken Broth and Seasoning Mix
1 cup Seeded and Diced Canned Italian Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3- to 4-quart saucepan, heat olive oil over high heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Add water and broth mixes; stir until dissolved.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add potatoes, tomatoes, carrot, and bay leaf; cover and let simmer until vegetables are tender, approximately 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Add remaining ingredients; cook until sausage and chick-peas are heated through, about 5 minutes longer.
6. Remove and discard the bay leaf before serving.
Makes 4 servings, about 1 1/3 cups each.
